M-076.NAME: premium-admin-cockpit
M-076.path: frontend-admin/src/components/Layout.tsx frontend-admin/src/components/StatCard.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Users.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Devices.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/MTProto.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/MTProtoAnalytics.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Analytics.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Servers.tsx frontend-admin/src/pages/Plans.tsx docs/plans/Phase-58.xml docs/plans/Phase-59.xml docs/plans/Phase-62.xml docs/plans/Phase-74.xml docs/plans/Phase-75.xml docs/plans/Phase-78.xml scripts/phase58-premium-admin-cockpit-smoke.mjs scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs scripts/phase62-compactness-deletion-smoke.mjs scripts/phase74-admin-shell-navigation-smoke.mjs scripts/phase75-admin-users-devices-smoke.mjs scripts/phase78-vpn-device-abuse-alerts-smoke.mjs
M-076.owns: Premium compact admin cockpit for service health, unified users/devices inventory, VPN abuse alert inbox/archive, MTProto, analytics, and operations; admin Tariffs is retired from visible cockpit navigation after Phase-74 and separate Devices navigation is retired after Phase-75.
M-076.purpose: Make admin operations scan-friendly and premium without reducing emergency control clarity.

exports.view-admin-command-home: Dense health, revenue, user, VPN, MTProto, and action summary.
exports.view-admin-inventories: Searchable compact users/devices/proxy lists with bounded scrolling and filters.
exports.view-admin-mtproto-ops: Redacted MTProto operations and analytics with confirmation-safe actions.
exports.rule-admin-deletion-audit: Remove bulky, duplicated, or low-value admin panels while preserving operations.
exports.rule-phase74-shell-order: Keep Logout directly under Nodes and remove the visible Tariffs route from admin cockpit navigation.
exports.rule-phase75-unified-users: Keep users and their devices in one bounded scan-friendly inventory while preserving emergency device actions.
exports.rule-phase78-vpn-abuse-inbox: Show high-signal VPN abuse alerts inside Users with archive, detail drawer, and one-device confirmed actions.

constraints.constraint-1: Admin emergency actions, destructive confirmations, and audit-sensitive feedback must remain visible.
constraints.constraint-2: MTProto tags, secrets, full links, raw tokens, and high-risk identifiers must remain redacted.
constraints.constraint-3: No backend API, auth/session, deploy, install, or runtime changes are included.
constraints.constraint-4: Phase-74 removes only the visible admin Tariffs route/nav; backend tariff logic and user purchase UI remain protected by M-068.
constraints.constraint-5: Phase-75 removes only the visible separate Devices navigation; device emergency actions must remain visible inside expanded user rows.

acceptance-metrics.metric-1: Frontend-admin build and premium admin smoke pass.
acceptance-metrics.metric-2: Static route proof verifies bounded inventories and reduced-motion markers; authenticated phone/tablet screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.
acceptance-metrics.metric-3: Phase-62 folded secondary MTProto archive/storage and server legacy notes while preserving admin operations, confirmations, analytics, redaction, and bounded inventories.
acceptance-metrics.metric-4: Phase-59 added admin feedback/status motion without hiding emergency, confirmation, redaction, or readonly controls.
acceptance-metrics.metric-5: Phase-58 protected guard permits only the shared Matrix VisualShell reliability diff while keeping backend/deploy/runtime protection intact.
acceptance-metrics.metric-6: Phase-74 proves Logout under Nodes, removed visible Tariffs route/nav, repaired content scroll, and bounded rail geometry.
acceptance-metrics.metric-7: Phase-75 proves one Users inventory, removed visible Devices nav, safe /devices redirect, preserved emergency device actions, and bounded expanded devices.
acceptance-metrics.metric-8: Phase-78 proves compact VPN abuse inbox/archive/detail/actions in Users without deploy/runtime/user-frontend drift.

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-06-04 pass-local: frontend-admin Layout, StatCard, Dashboard, Users, Devices, MTProto, MTProtoAnalytics, Analytics, Servers, Plans, shared admin CSS, and Phase-58 smoke were updated for premium command center, bounded inventories, MTProto redaction, confirmation guards, tariff readonly guard, analytics readonly guard, reduced-motion proof, and protected-surface isolation.
evidence.evidence-2: Verification passed: cd frontend-admin && npm run build; node scripts/phase58-premium-admin-cockpit-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase54-admin-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase42-mtproto-admin-analytics-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase43-mtproto-admin-analytics-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase50-tariff-catalog-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase52-matrix-visual-smoke.mjs; node scripts/phase55-premium-art-direction-smoke.mjs; XML parse; mygrace lint; git diff --check; protected backend/deploy/runtime/frontend-user guard.
evidence.evidence-3: 2026-06-04 pass-local: Phase-59 added admin feedback/status motion markers to Devices, MTProto, MTProtoAnalytics, and shared admin CSS; frontend-admin build, Phase-59 smoke, and post-commit Phase-58 regression smoke passed.
evidence.evidence-4: 2026-06-04 pass-local: Phase-62 added admin deletion-audit markers, folded alert archive/storage/topology legacy notes, preserved confirmation/redaction guards, and passed frontend-admin build, Phase-62 smoke, Phase-54/58/60/61 regressions, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard.
evidence.evidence-5: 2026-06-04 pass-local-rainfix: Phase-58 smoke guard was updated to allow the shared user VisualShell Matrix reliability diff during Phase-60 regression while still rejecting backend/deploy/runtime/admin-protected drift. Phase-60 QA passed.
evidence.evidence-6: 2026-06-05 pass-local: Phase-74 frontend-admin build and smoke passed for logout-under-Nodes, no visible Tariffs nav, safe /plans redirect, content scroll, rail bounds, and protected backend/deploy/runtime/user frontend guard.
evidence.evidence-7: 2026-06-05 pass-local: Phase-75 frontend-admin build and smoke passed for single Users inventory, no visible Devices nav, safe /devices redirect, preserved device action confirmations, bounded expanded device rows, and protected backend/deploy/runtime/user frontend guard.
evidence.evidence-8: 2026-06-06 pass-local: Phase-78 frontend-admin build and smoke passed for VPN abuse open inbox, archive, detail drawer, confirmation copy, and one-device action scope.

phase-74-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Retire visible admin Tariffs from the cockpit, redirect direct /plans visits, keep Logout under Nodes, and repair scroll ownership for admin content.
phase-74-executed-scope.verification: Phase-74 smoke passed PremiumAdminCockpit markers LOGOUT_UNDER_NODES, TARIFFS_ROUTE_REMOVED, and CONTENT_SCROLL_REPAIRED.

phase-75-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Merge admin Users and Devices into one scan-friendly cockpit inventory while preserving direct emergency actions and confirmation surfaces.
phase-75-executed-scope.verification: Phase-75 smoke passed PremiumAdminCockpit markers USERS_INVENTORY_UNIFIED, DEVICES_NAV_REMOVED, EMERGENCY_DEVICE_ACTIONS_PRESERVED, and BOUNDED_EXPANDED_DEVICES.

phase-78-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Render open VPN abuse alerts above the unified Users inventory, expose resolved archive, show detail drawer, and require confirmation for resolve/rotate/block.
phase-78-executed-scope.verification: Phase-78 smoke passed PremiumAdminCockpit and DeviceAdminControl markers for VPN abuse alert inbox, archive, and one-device actions.

M-076.hotspot: H-063: Premium admin cockpit must improve scanability without hiding emergency controls, MTProto redaction, or confirmation flows.
